content: I'd love to build an app that supports web MIDI one day to read an event stream from my controller and render notes to the screen, or record and author tracks. I've really enjoyed some of the tools that are available online for site reading training etc. From playing around with parsers, I feel like it will be pretty easy to handle binary encodings in Roc, and should be super performant too. Just thought I'd share in case anyone else is interested. I think its up there with text and graphics on my list of fun things to play around with post-AoC.
